metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for the Oracle AI Data Platform Workbench Spark Connectors Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: oracle-ai-data-platform-workbench-spark-connectors
plugins.description: Oracle AI Data Platform Workbench Spark connectors for Claude Code. 18 connector skills covering every data source workbench customers commonly need: Oracle Autonomous DB family (ALH/ADW/ATP), ExaCS, Fusion ERP REST, Fusion BICC, EPM Cloud Planning, Essbase 21c, OCI Streaming, OCI Object Storage, Apache Iceberg, plus PostgreSQL, MySQL/HeatWave, SQL Server, Snowflake, Azure ADLS Gen2, AWS S3, generic REST, custom JDBC, and Excel. Live-validated end-to-end on Spark 3.5.0.
